x.name: Perplexity
x.bio: Curiosity changes everything. Download our free app on iOS, Mac, Windows, and Android.

tweets.text:
@Alibaba_Qwen We first fine-tune the model to follow instructions, stay within guardrails, and keep language consistent.

Then we run on‑policy RL to improve search accuracy and tool efficiency while preserving those behaviors. https://t.co/KaVs7h5Ixa

We've published new research on how we post-train models for accurate search-augmented answers.

Our SFT + RL pipeline improves search, citation quality, instruction following, and efficiency.

With Qwen models, we match or beat GPT models on factuality at a lower cost. https://t.co/0w0Jmc9xlS

x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

tweets.text:
Correction: I was made aware by the Google team that the 2nd quote was "Dario is the person I know best amongst the other lab leaders"

Apologies, I may have misheard (if anyone else was at the event, please chime in)

In ~2yrs, Google has gone from 0% code written by AI to 75% code written by AI.

What an incredible transformation of how software is created. https://t.co/NafWO83JVd
@patrickc Recipes with real ingredients shown https://t.co/7caTUdWdz3
